steps.title: Identify the reversal in findings
steps.content: Slow blinks correlate with less talking; quicker blinks correlate with more talking. These are opposite outcomes, not an elaboration or example.

steps.title: Match the reversal with the right transition
steps.content: ”By contrast,” signals opposition and reversal between ideas. “For example,” “Specifically,” and “Firstly,” all indicate progression or elaboration in the same direction. That matches choice D — D is correct.
